documentation.value: Imports a React component or module for use within the MDX document.
The name to bind the imported module to.
The module path or package name to import from.
Imports a named export from a module for use in the MDX document.
The named export to import.
The module path or package name.
Exports a default layout component that wraps the MDX content.
Props passed to the layout, including children (the MDX content).
Exports metadata or constants that can be consumed by the framework or other components.
An object containing exported values (e.g., title, description, date).
Renders a JSX component inline within MDX content. Props can be static strings or dynamic expressions.
The React component name (must be capitalized).
A prop name passed to the component.
The prop value, either a string or a JSX expression in curly braces.
Renders a JSX component with children content, which can be markdown or other JSX.
The React component name.
Content between the opening and closing tags (markdown, text, or JSX).
Embeds a JavaScript expression inline. The result is rendered into the document.
Any valid JavaScript expression that returns a renderable value.
Defines and exports a React component within the MDX file for reuse.
The name of the component to export.
The props the component accepts.
A common MDX component for creating tabbed content sections.
An array of tab labels.
A common MDX component for creating callout/admonition blocks with different severity levels.
The callout type: 'info', 'warning', 'error', 'default'.
The callout message content.
